data.title: Crude oil rises sharply; US consumer sentiment edges higher in January. Stocks up: Nasdaq by 150 points. Dow up 0.38% to 49,453.05, NASDAQ up 0.66% to 23,635.11, S&P 500 up 0.48% to 6,954.85. Consumer sentiment index at 54.0 in January. Top gainers: Rich Sparkle Holdings Ltd up 115% to $52.00, Quanterix Corp up 31% to $8.54.
data.description: In the midst of trading, U.S. stocks saw gains with the Nasdaq Composite rising by approximately 150 points on Friday. The Dow experienced a 0.38% increase, reaching 49,453.05, while the NASDAQ climbed 0.66% to 23,635.11. The S&P 500 also showed an increase of 0.48%, reaching 6,954.85. Utilities sector shares saw a 1.5% increase, while healthcare stocks dipped by 0.5%. The University of Michigan's consumer sentiment index rose to 54.0 in January, marking its highest level since September 2025. Notable stock movements include Rich Sparkle Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ: ANPA) surging by 115% to $52.00 after a $39 million offering of 3 million ordinary shares at $13 per share, and Quanterix Corp (NASDAQ: QTRX) rising by 31% to $8.54 following the appointment of Everett Cunningham as President and CEO. For more details, visit a financial news website.

data.title: ASN supports transparency in national nutrition guidance, emphasizing the importance of strong science. (Characters: 81)
data.description: The American Society for Nutrition (ASN) is calling for greater transparency regarding the scientific methodology utilized in the latest Dietary Guidelines for Americans (DGAs), released for the period 2025-2030. ASN endorses the comprehensive dietary approach outlined in the guidelines, which stresses the importance of minimal consumption levels. The guidelines were made public on January 9, 2026, in Bethesda, Maryland.

data.title: United Arab Emirates AI infrastructure market report offers insights, trends, forecasts up to 2032. GlobalKey numbers not provided.
data.description: A report on the AI infrastructure market in the United Arab Emirates has been released and is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This country research report offers insights and analysis of the market in the UAE, including forecasts up to 2032. The report delves into demand forecasts, market trends, and various micro and macro indicators. This comprehensive study provides a detailed look at the AI infrastructure market in the United Arab Emirates, offering valuable information for businesses and stakeholders.

data.title: Blue Yonder launches AI-driven innovations for retail supply chains, helping increase agility and optimize customer experiences.
data.description: In Dallas, retail supply chains are under significant strain, with increasing complexity and disconnected operations causing profit margins to decrease and customer satisfaction to decline. Blue Yonder has responded by launching AI-powered enhancements in their planning and execution tools for retailers. These innovations aim to enhance flexibility, improve customer experiences, and boost profitability. The surge in customer expectations for swift, personalized, and convenient service is a key driver behind this initiative.

data.title: Trump's tariffs likely to stand, with 75% chance of SCOTUS approval. Polymarket traders predict only 25% approval. $150B refunds at stake for companies.
data.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has not yet reached a decision on President Donald Trump's broad global tariffs. Traders believe there is a 75% likelihood that the Supreme Court will ultimately support Trump's tariffs. Polymarket indicates a 25% chance of Trump prevailing in the tariff case. The court has not provided a timeline for its judgment. Trump utilized the International Emergency Economic Powers Act to enforce reciprocal tariffs on goods from almost all foreign trade partners, citing trade imbalances as a national crisis. He also applied this law to impose tariffs on China, Canada, and Mexico, citing fentanyl trafficking concerns. By utilizing a law from 1977 intended for national emergencies, Trump enforced the tariffs, causing lower courts to rule that he overstepped his authority. The administration challenged these rulings, leading to the ongoing Supreme Court evaluation. Major companies could be eligible for $150 billion in reimbursements. Company executives, customs brokers, and more are affected. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Kroger sold Vitacost.com to iHerb, focusing on its grocery operations. The transfer supports goal to streamline and enhance operations.
data.description: Kroger Company (NYSE: KR) recently announced the sale of its online wellness unit, Vitacost.com, to iHerb as part of its strategic decision to focus on grocery operations. The transaction was closed on January 8 after a thorough review of non-core business lines. The move is aimed at streamlining operations and improving customer experiences. Kroger plans to redirect capital towards food retail, supply chain improvements, and in-store investments. Ron Sargent, Kroger's chairman and CEO, highlighted the importance of the divestment in achieving these goals.

data.title: Tigé Boats' Ultré ZX wins 2025 Boat of the Year in Watersports from Boating Magazine, a prestigious honor.
data.description: In Abilene, Texas, on January 9, 2026, Tigé Boats revealed that the Ultré ZX has clinched the prestigious title of 2025 Boat of the Year in the Watersports division by Boating Magazine. This recognition stands as a significant achievement within the industry. The Ultré ZX was chosen for its exceptional features and performance, solidifying its position as a standout in the competitive watersports category.
